review: Spicy Chicken Shawarma really matched my taste. The shawarma angle worked, portion was medium, and the price felt fair for the experience.
Bole and Fish Combo really matched my taste. The bole angle worked, portion was large, and the price felt fair for the experience.
Grilled Chicken Salad Bowl was a good pick. I liked the healthy feel and delivery was smooth, though there is still small room to improve.
Puff-Puff Sharing Bowl really matched my taste. The puff-puff angle worked, portion was sharing, and the price felt fair for the experience.
Office Lunch Rice Bowl was a good pick. I liked the office lunch feel and delivery was smooth, though there is still small room to improve.
Zobo Ginger Bottle really matched my taste. The zobo angle worked, portion was single, and the price felt fair for the experience.
Fresh Orange Juice was a good pick. I liked the juice feel and delivery was smooth, though there is still small room to improve.
Student Grocery Starter Pack was a good pick. I liked the grocery feel and delivery was smooth, though there is still small room to improve.
Nigerian Campus Love Stories was a good pick. I liked the campus feel and delivery was smooth, though there is still small room to improve.
Nigerian Startup Playbook was okay, not bad but not outstanding. The price around NGN 7,000 needs to match the portion and freshness better.
Small Chops Box was okay, not bad but not outstanding. The price around NGN 6,000 needs to match the portion and freshness better.
Ofada Rice and Ayamase was okay, not bad but not outstanding. The price around NGN 4,800 needs to match the portion and freshness better.
Beans and Plantain Bowl was okay, not bad but not outstanding. The price around NGN 2,400 needs to match the portion and freshness better.
Smoky Party Jollof Tray did not fully work for me. Delivery, portion, or value felt off, so I expected more for the money.
Tiger Nut Drink was okay, not bad but not outstanding. The price around NGN 1,200 needs to match the portion and freshness better.
